metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_4151
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 6. The authors find that neurotransmitter release and the readily releasable pool are increased in TBC1D24 / Skywalker mutants in drosophila. To show that TBC1D24 / Skywalker mutations affect neurotransmitter release, authors recorded excitatory junctional potentials (EJPs) elicited at 1 Hz. EJP amplitudes are increased in mutants when compared to controls over a range of Ca2+ concentrations (0.3-1 mM), but saturate above 2 mM Ca2+ (Figures 6A and 6B). Authors also find that this increased neurotransmission in sky mutants does not result in quicker synaptic depression during trains of repetitive stimulation (Figure S5). Hence, sky mutations result in increased transmitter release but harbour a normal calcium dependence of release. In addition, activity-driven Ca2+ increases are also confirmed to not be altered in Skywalker mutants using calcium imaging with the optical sensor G-CaMP1.6.

To estimate junctional quantal content authors measured EJCs in voltage clamp. In Skywalker mutants, EJCs recorded in 0.5 mM Ca2+ are increased and this is rescued in larvae expressing wild-type Skywalker (Figures 6C and 6D). Consequently, the authors conclude the quantal content (EJC/mEJC) to be nearly doubled in sky mutants compared controls (Figure 6E).

18/01/2021 Dnyanada: The paper establishes that Sky (TBC1D24) is a GTPase activating protein specific for Rab35 (Figure 5). Expression of a dominant-negative version of Rab35 in sky mutants restores FM1-43 to a wildtype like distribution, indicating that Skywalker functions to regulate Rab35-mediated trafficking. Furthermore, ubiquitinated proteins (an artificial chimeric version of synaptobrevin) is more efficiently shuttled for degradation in sky mutants relative to WT (Figure 7).
The effect of sky on the synaptic vesicle cycle (as described in the annotation; Figure 6) can be attributed to its ability to regulate endosomal processing of synaptic vesicle proteins. Based on this, the ontology term "synaptic vesicle endosomal processing" was used for this annotation.
As the effect on SV endosomal processing in sky mutants is not drastically altered, the "regulation" box was ticked.. Experimental description: "Larvae were grown on grape juice plates with fresh yeast paste", "All fly stocks were kept on standard corn meal and molasses medium at room temperature", "In this work, we present evidence that (...) Skywalker (Sky) facilitates endosomal trafficking of synaptic vesicles at Drosophila neuromuscular junction boutons"
